## Summary

- What this PR does (1-3 bullets)

## Type of Change

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Skill improvement
- [ ] Mental model change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] I've read `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] New/modified skills have `README.md` and `workflows.md`
- [ ] `skills/manifest.yaml` and `skills/_index.md` are updated (if adding/modifying a skill)
- [ ] Internal links are valid
- [ ] Token budget is within limits (< 20K per skill)
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](templates/COMMIT.md)

## Testing

Describe how you verified the changes work correctly (e.g., tested with an AI agent, validated YAML, checked links).
